landing.title: Welcome to BMad Blackjack
landing.description: Learn to make the best mathematical decisions, not just rely on luck.
landing.metaDescription: Master Blackjack and game theory with our Expected Value (EV) based simulator.

features.evDesc: Every decision is evaluated in real-time based on Expected Value.
features.riskDesc: Use virtual currency and learn the basics without any financial risk.
features.guideDesc: Move from beginner to expert mode with personalized tips.

game.readyToPlay: Ready to play? Place your bet.

ev.explanation_hit_on_16: Hitting on 16 against a low card provides negative EV compared to standing.
ev.explanation_generic: This was not the best mathematical choice.
ev.explanation_stand_high: Standing on a high total is better — hitting risks busting.
ev.explanation_hit_low: With a low total, hitting gives you more chances to improve your hand.
ev.explanation_double_opportunity: This was a strong doubling opportunity with favorable EV.
ev.explanation_hit_recommended: Hitting would have given better expected value in this situation.
ev.explanation_stand_recommended: Standing was the mathematically optimal play here.
